commonMistakes: Losing leg drive and upper-back tension.
description: Horizontal pressing pattern for upper-body strength and hypertrophy.
instructions: Set the upper back and feet before unracking.
Lower the bar or handles under control to the torso.
Press up while maintaining a stable ribcage and shoulder position.
name: Bench Press
tips: Keep forearms stacked under the load.
